title: RetailDaddy SaaS Demo
opening: Hello, I am the RetailDaddy AI demo assistant. I will walk you through the product and answer questions as we go.
closing: That is the end of the core walkthrough. I can now answer questions about setup, pricing, integrations, workflows, or anything you want to inspect again.

steps.title: Dashboard overview
steps.say: We will start on the dashboard. This gives a quick view of sales, inventory health, low stock alerts, and pending actions.

steps.title: Inventory tracking
steps.say: Next, I will show inventory tracking. This is where store teams can monitor SKU availability, reorder points, and stock movement.

steps.title: Order management
steps.say: Here is order management. The flow is designed to reduce manual follow-up and make exceptions easy to spot.

steps.title: Reports
steps.say: Finally, reports help owners and operators compare store performance, identify fast-moving products, and catch margin leakage.
